name: Office Application Spawning a Command Shell
description: Detects an Office productivity application spawning a command interpreter, a behavior frequently associated with malicious document macros.
query: process where event.type == "start" and process.parent.name in ("winword.exe", "excel.exe", "powerpnt.exe") and process.name in ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "wscript.exe")
false_positives: Some add-ins and automation tools legitimately launch scripts from Office.
